calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Written Order Received

1st & Final Accnt. & Rep. Of Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Saroya Leonardini (Counsel for Hugo Nevarez, Trustee); Sarah Derochemont (Counsel for Estela Rodriguez and Amalia Nevarez, Objectors - appearing by telephone).

After extensive presentation and rebuttal concerning the Trustee's fees, amounts charged for repairs to the real property, adn bank charges (among others), the Court granted the Accounting petition. Ms. Leonardini is to prepare the Order.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

1st & Final Accnt. & Rep. Of Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-02-2007 Continued To Jan-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

1st & Final Accnt. & Rep. Of Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Continued To Jan-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
